ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-09-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Continued To May-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian Flynn for Administrator

The Court noted that a Corrected Inventory and Appraisal was filed but there is no prior Inventory and Appraisal, that it did not indicate if it was a partial or final. Mr. Flynn stated that it was titled as a corrected inventory and appraisal by mistake, the estate is worth $10,000, he would like to take this out of Probate and proceed by way of a small estate affidavit, and the inventory and appraisal is a final. The Court stated that Probate is now open, that counsel will have to file something to close it, and that he now has to file a corrected inventory and appraisal. The status on close of estate and filing of final/corrected inventory and appraisal is continued to May 9, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
